BLOCKED NOTE: PlayerAttack uses InputAction('<Mouse>/leftButton') internally. InputTestFixture.Press(mouse.leftButton) injects into virtual device but PlayerAttack binds at Awake via new InputAction — may not see the virtual device. Workaround: expose a TestAttack() method on PlayerAttack to bypass input.
